name: GSM Signal Strength - rfobasic
snippet:
Feb 14, 2014 — Issue the system command dumpsys telephony.registry . Then read the entry related to SignalStrength. You can try this on the emulator, via "adb". Read more
Issue the system command dumpsys telephony.registry. Then read the entry related to SignalStrength. You can try this on the emulator, via "adb".
